name: Story Maker Remake
description:
This A.I. will help you create and experience whatever story you want. It will role play whatever non-player characters you need it to. It is HIGHLY recommended that you create and use a character persona for your character's story. You can also setup some advanced A.I. prompts to better control your story's development (settings panel in the chat - API Settings). Your character's story can be based in anything: a series/show, movies, games, books, history, etc. You can also create your own original story for your character to experience; this is by far the best bot out for this.

Anyways. This is a remake of the bot that was deleted or privated recently. I enjoyed that bot a lot since it was so open ended, so I decided to make this for myself. The bot is likely very similar to the previous one, but nothing is perfect. I’ve only ever tried the bot with a proxy so it could be completely different when used with a different one. Hope it works, lmk in the comments.

I’ve used my own bot pretty consistently and I can say for certain that an intelligent proxy makes a huge difference. If you aren’t getting the messages you want, switching to a different proxy has helped me numerous times.
creator: fatsteamingload
